chapter_title.en: The Virtue of Mosques, Their Sanctity and the Reward for Those Who Pray in Them

parts.text: 708 - وَ رَأَى عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مَسْجِداً بِالْكُوفَةِ قَدْ شُرِّفَ قَالَ

text: «كَأَنَّهُ بِيعَةٌ إِنَّ اَلْمَسَاجِدَ لاَ تُشَرَّفُ تُبْنَى جُمّاً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.708 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) saw a mosque in Kufa that had been decorated or elevated and said:
"It is as if it is a church. Mosques are not to be adorned; they should be built plain (simple)."
